title: DENTAL CARE - 211info
text: WATERFALL DENTAL CLINIC DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic dental care services. Services include dental screening and education, cleanings, fluoride treatments, sealants, and referral to other services. Does not do extractions, fillings, or other major dental work. 1885 Waite Street North Bend, OR 97459 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm Email (541) 696-5006 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 696-5006 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Sealants may be free or low cost for eligible children. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income verification for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Douglas Counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WATERFALL DENTAL CLINIC
